main.description: Delete a block (unban) on behalf of a streamer. Requires 'ban' permission. Deletes an app.bsky.graph.block record from the streamer's repository.

blockUri.description: The AT-URI of the block record to delete.

errors.name: Unauthorized
errors.description: The request lacks valid authentication credentials.

errors.name: Forbidden
errors.description: The caller does not have permission to delete blocks for this streamer.

errors.name: SessionNotFound
errors.description: The streamer's OAuth session could not be found or is invalid.
